subject: [SO] Onboard ONAP CA during init phase
commit_message:
[SO] Onboard ONAP CA during init phase

Workaround for retrieving ONAP root CA and keeping SO container being
run by no root user.

Issue-ID: SO-2730
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ib1b48c0a6fcca359a780640b8c705e75fd78dc1a

Patch Set 1:

This is a workaround for onboarding ONAP root CA into the running instance while keeping SO container to be run as root.

If / When:
 * it works
 * Krzsysztof is OK (I'm pretty sure he won't ;) )

I'll generalize it to all SO components
Set Work In Progress
